text: carbs is 10.6g. but the real story is the context, not the nutrition profile.

the upsides first. very available and cheap because that is about the only practical argument it has. clear real-world role because if a misc item helps or harms behavior, that matters a lot. context tells the real story because that is the whole point of misc.

on the weaker side. liquid sugar is a brutal downside because this is almost the exact kind of misc item the category should bury. easy to overrate or misuse because this category attracts strong marketing and habits. better replacements often exist because that practical comparison matters.
Regular Cola is D tier. Best treated as an occasional context item, not a nutritional base.
